phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cruise terminal is
phrases.text_local: ¿Podría indicarme dónde está la terminal de cruceros?
phrases.pronunciation: pod-DREE-ah een-dee-KAR-meh DON-deh eh-STAH lah tehr-mee-NAHL deh kroo-SEH-rohs?

likely_response.local: Al final del muelle, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL fee-NAHL DEHL moo-EHL-leh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the pier, on the left.

responses.english: At the end of the pier, on the left.
responses.phonetic: AHL fee-NAHL DEHL moo-EHL-leh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Al final del muelle, a la izquierda.

phrases.text_local: ¿Sabe dónde hay restaurantes cerca del puerto?
phrases.pronunciation: ¿SAH-beh DOHN-deh EYE res-tow-RAHN-tes KEHR-kah del PWEHR-toh?

likely_response.local: Siga el paseo marítimo hacia la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah EHL pah-SEH-oh mah-RÍ-tee-moh ah-THEE-ah LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the promenade towards the right.

responses.english: Follow the promenade towards the right.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah EHL pah-SEH-oh mah-RÍ-tee-moh ah-THEE-ah LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Siga el paseo marítimo hacia la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find boat tour tickets
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde venden los billetes de excursiones?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh BEN-den los bee-YEH-tes deh eks-koor-SYOH-nes?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla junto al muelle 4.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah HOON-toh AHL moo-EHL-leh
likely_response.translation_en: At ticket booth two, on your left.

responses.english: At ticket booth two, on your left.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah HOON-toh AHL moo-EHL-leh
responses.french: En la taquilla junto al muelle 4.

phrases.intent_en: Ask when the next ferry to UK departs
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cuándo sale el próximo ferry al Reino Unido?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, KWAHN-doh SAH-leh ehl PROH-see-moh FEH-ree ahl RAY-noh oo-NEE-doh?

likely_response.translation_en: The time is indicated on the screen.

responses.english: The time is indicated on the screen.
